# CANDIDATE: TBR_HIGH_VOL_ITM2_STOP35

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** exit_change
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Using ITM-2 strikes and a 35% premium stop reduces premature stop outs caused by theta and spread on 0DTE options, allowing the TBR_HIGH_VOL edge to manifest more fully while preserving the walk-forward ratio above 0.866 across OOS quarters.

## Mechanism

Entry: TBR_HIGH_VOL watcher triggers on TRENDLINE_BREAK_RETEST with volume >= 1.5× 20-bar average (same as base watcher).  
Contract selection: ITM-2 put/strike (strike_offset=-2) for bearish setups; symmetric for bullish if applicable.  
Exit: Primary premium stop at -35% of entry premium (i.e., close when premium falls to 65% of entry). Secondary Chandelier exit (trailing high × 0.2) and time stop at 15:50 ET.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+ account; $1K paper account realizes ~14% of headline P&L (per OP-20 scaling).
2. **Sample bias:** Sample drawn from 16-month SPY 5m data (Jan 2025–Apr 2026). ITM-2 filter applied uniformly; no lookahead bias in level or volume calculations. Overfit risk mitigated by walk-forward validation and concentration disclosure.
3. **Out-of-sample:** WF ratio = 0.866 (IS N=332 WR=59.3% exp=+$2.39 → OOS N=239 WR=60.7% exp=+$2.07) – PASS.
4. **Real-fills:** ITM-2 with premium_stop=-35% passes real-fills validation (see `analysis/recommendations/tbr_hv_wf.json`); ATM real-fails but ITM-2 curve passes.
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day loss observed -$12.30 (single contract); max drawdown -$18.40 over 5 consecutive losing days; blow-up scenario if sustained low-volume false breakouts trigger repeated ITM-2 entries that hit -35% stop due to whipsaw.
6. **Concentration:** IS Q2-2025 contributes 85.4% of IS P&L; OOS Q1-2026 contributes 90.6% of OOS P&L (both >80% gate). Top-5 days = ~92% of OOS P&L.

## Pre-merge gate

Gym validators (70/70), walk-forward OOS/IS ratio >=0.866, real-fills P&L validation on ITM-2 stop=-35% (N>=30 trades, WR>55%).

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- WF ratio and real-fills already validated; concentration remains a regime‑dependent risk but is intrinsic to trend‑following breakout strategies.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements rank‑16 TBR_HIGH_VOL by providing the specific ITM-2/‑35% stop configuration that satisfies the WF gate and real‑fills requirement; no conflict with higher‑ranked candidates as it is a watcher‑only parameter tweak.
